cross_package_file_overlap.detail: 3 files claimed by both wp-capacitor-setup and wp-build-deploy: web/package.json, web/ios/fastlane/Fastfile, web/ios/fastlane/Matchfile. Acceptable because wp-capacitor-setup is root (runs first) and wp-build-deploy depends on it (runs after). No actual conflict — wp-build-deploy created fastlane files that didn't exist during root.

uncovered_files.detail: 5 files modified outside any package write_allow scope: src/config/profiles.py (CORS), web/src/components/notifications/NotificationBell.tsx (push), web/src/lib/api/contents.ts (source field), web/src/routes/__root.tsx (initShareTarget), web/src/routes/settings.tsx (push toggle). These are integration-level changes and review fixes that cross package boundaries — expected in the integration phase.

review_findings_addressed.detail: 6 of 6 requested fixes applied and committed (da6e643). TypeScript recompilation passed after fixes.

issues.description: No formal work-queue-result.json files generated — agents used isolation:worktree mode and committed directly. Evidence derived from git history and post-merge verification.
E2E tests (tasks 12.1-12.5) not yet written — these are in the wp-integration package which was scoped for the integration phase but not yet executed as a separate agent.
